name: canonical_product
description: Canonical structure for a normalized catalog product. parse_supplier_feed maps a supplier's raw feed rows into this shape; downstream tools validate, categorize, and report on them.

sku.description: Supplier stock-keeping unit (unique within the feed).

supplier_category.description: Raw free-text category from the supplier feed (mapped to the canonical taxonomy by map_to_canonical_taxonomy).

canonical_category.description: Canonical taxonomy path, filled by map_to_canonical_taxonomy (e.g. 'Apparel > Footwear').

attributes.description: Free-form key/value product attributes (color, size, material, ...).
